concept: Obsidian Tactical Luxury. An evolution of the existing dark glassmorphism into a tighter, more precise 'milled crystal' look. It removes generic blue glows and replaces them with stark contrast, pure white data, and surgical neon accents to create an ultra-premium, high-frequency trading feel.

headings.usage: H1, H2, Hero numbers. Must use tracking-tight.

body.usage: Primary UI text, labels, generic descriptions.

mono.usage: Terminal logs, live P/L numbers, timestamps, lot sizes.

surfaces.glass_card: bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/5 rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]

layout_and_spacing.padding_scale: Mobile-first standard: p-4 to p-6 for screen edges. Cards use p-5.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Concentric: Wrapper rounded-3xl, inner elements rounded-2xl or rounded-xl. Buttons rounded-full.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-aligned for data rows (label left, value right). Center-aligned for primary Actions like Start EA.

motion_and_interactions.perceived_speed: Heavy use of animate-pulse for loading states (skeletons) using neutral-900. Instant optimistic UI updates.
motion_and_interactions.tap_feedback: active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform duration-100 ease-out on all buttons, list rows, and cards.
motion_and_interactions.terminal_pulse: Live indicator dot should use animate-ping with #00E676. Terminal text lines should stagger in.

activation_screen.description: Centered glass card in pure void. Inputs have 1px base borders, focusing to solid white. Large premium 'Unlock' CTA.

home_dashboard.description: Hero section shows live status. Main 'Start EA' is a massive pill button with a glowing background mesh.

terminal_panel.description: Pitch black container, JetBrains Mono text. Left-aligned logs. A pulsing green dot in the top right.

trade_history.description: List of flat rows (no cards). Symbol (Manrope) + Buy/Sell Badge + P/L (JetBrains Mono).

drawers.description: Settings, Connect Broker, Pairs, Menu. Use Vaul/Shadcn Drawer. Must have a drag handle (w-12 h-1 bg-white/20 rounded-full).

chart_scanner.description: Upload area uses a dashed border with a high-end abstract dark background. AI prediction uses a progress bar and glowing confidence text.

icons_strategy: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Duotone weight for general nav, Fill for active states.
testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-ea-button').
instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure pure JSON parsing. Implement mobile PWA layouts (h-screen, overflow-y-auto). Strictly use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and JetBrains Mono for the terminal. No '3.0' text anywhere. Install Phosphor Icons, Framer Motion, and clsx/tailwind-merge if not present.
